news.headline: Daly: Interest rates are effective, but progress is slow.
Stock market gains on Dow Jones despite -100 points from Nike, chip stocks lead Nasdaq 100 after inflation report.
news.summary: Key stock market indexes saw significant increases today following the release of the latest inflation report. The Dow Jones index maintained a 100-point gain despite a sell-off in Nike stocks, while chip stocks led the way in Nasdaq 100. This development is an indicator of positive market sentiment and economic stability.

news.headline: SFC warns against Tokencan, VBIT Exchange, and HKD.com for fraud & unlicensed actions. (Read More)
news.summary: The Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has raised concerns regarding Tokencan, VBIT Exchange, and HKD.com Corporation for their alleged involvement in virtual asset-related scams and operating without proper licenses. These companies are suspected of engaging in fraudulent activities within the virtual asset sector. For more information, please refer to the official statement released by the SFC.

news.headline: SHIB and PEPE whales selling amid crypto correction, $8M PEPE coins to Binance, meme coin sector hits $50B market cap. BTC dips below $60k, crypto market cap drops to $2.3T from $2.83T in April, causing altcoin sell-offs.
news.summary: The meme coin sector is facing a significant downturn, with its aggregate market cap dropping below $50 billion amid the overall volatile consolidation of the crypto market. Notably, whales holding Shiba Inu (SHIB) and Pepecoin (PEPE) are causing a stir with substantial sell orders, coinciding with Bitcoin dipping below $60,000. These actions are contributing to a decrease in the fear and greed index within the crypto market, particularly affecting meme coins. Additionally, the overall crypto market cap has fallen to around $2.3 trillion from a high of $2.83 trillion in April. This market turbulence is leading to widespread altcoin sell-offs. Amidst these developments, 1 in 4 Americans reportedly owns a share of Bitcoin, and Cathie Wood has suggested that holding 6 Ethereum (ETH) could potentially lead to becoming a millionaire. For further details, readers can refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 21Shares to file for Solana ETF in US after VanEck, reflecting the growing interest in the digital asset market.
news.summary: 21Shares is planning to introduce its own Solana exchange-traded fund (ETF) in the U.S., joining VanEck which filed for their own Solana ETF.

news.headline: Global automotive floor carpet market to grow by $1.21 billion (3.2% CAGR) from 2024-2028 due to Western market demand for vehicle customization - Technavio.
news.summary: As of June 28, 2024, the global automotive floor carpet market is projected to increase by approximately USD 1.21 billion between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. The market is expected to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.2% throughout the forecast period. This growth is driven by the increasing interest in vehicle personalization and customization, leading to a surge in demand for automotive floor carpets worldwide.

news.headline: Viral Launch wins Best Blog Content Strategy at Netty Awards, solidifying their exceptional work in eCommerce.
news.summary: At the Netty Awards in Reston, Virginia, eCommerce leader Viral Launch was recognized for their outstanding work by winning the Best Blog Content Strategy award. This latest achievement highlights Viral Launch's dedication to delivering exceptional results across various areas. The award serves as a testament to the hard work and commitment of the team, who consistently strive for excellence. Winning this prestigious accolade further solidifies Viral Launch's position as an industry trailblazer, showcasing their expertise and innovation. The recognition received at the Netty Awards underscores the company's ongoing success and the quality of their blog content strategy. This honor truly reflects the team's tireless efforts and dedication to excellence.

news.headline: Sealed Air Corp closed offering of $400 million senior notes with 6.5% interest.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Sealed Air Corporation ("SEE") disclosed the completion of an offering of $400 million aggregate principal amount of 6.500% senior notes. This offering was announced in conjunction with Sealed Air Corporation (US), collectively known as the "Issuers." The senior notes were closed as per the announcement. The Issuers carried out this offering as part of their financial activities.

news.headline: Merck's new 21-valent pneumococcal vaccine Capvaxive approved by FDA for adults, covering 84% of invasive pneumococcal disease.
news.summary: Merck's new 21-valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine, Capvaxive, has been recommended by the U.S. CDC's Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices. The FDA recently approved Capvaxive for adults to prevent invasive pneumococcal disease and pneumonia. This vaccine targets serotypes responsible for 84% of invasive pneumococcal disease in adults aged 50 and above in the U.S., covering eight serotypes not included in current vaccines. ACIP suggests a single dose for adults aged 65 and above, 19-64 with certain medical conditions, and those over 19 who started their vaccine series with the 13-valent PCV.

news.headline: Economist Bowman notes robust employment, but inflation goal remains unmet.
Fed's Bowman aims to reach inflation target independently.
Ludex hires former eBay Sports Trading Card Manager Jeff Juco, aims to boost growth in AI technology.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Ludex, the innovative AI-powered platform for sports and trading card enthusiasts, welcomed Jeff Juco to its team. Juco, who formerly held the position of Category Manager of Sports Trading Cards at eBay, has joined Ludex after several years of experience in the industry. This hiring marks a significant move for Ludex as they aim to further establish themselves in the market.

news.headline: Essential Utilities (NYSE: WTRG) to report Q2 2024 earnings on August 5, 2024, with conference call on August 6, 2024, at 11 am EDT. Webcast available.
news.summary: Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) anticipates announcing its second-quarter earnings for 2024 on August 5, 2024, after the market's closure. The forthcoming conference call with financial analysts is scheduled for August 6, 2024, at 11 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time. The webcast of the call and presentation will be live on Essential.co for those interested in listening online.

news.headline: VeeMost Technologies signs letter of intent to acquire Texas IT company, generating annual revenues of $10 million.
news.summary: Red Bank, New Jersey - On June 28, 2024, VeeMost Technologies, Inc., previously known as Global Developments, Inc. (OTC:GDVM), a prominent player in innovative IT solutions, revealed the signing of a Letter of Intent to purchase a well-known IT company based in Texas. This move is aimed at strengthening VeeMost's competencies and market position, given that the Texas company achieves annual revenues of around $10 million.

news.headline: Cloud infrastructure spending up 36.9% YoY in Q1 2024, driven by AI-related investments per IDC. Major growth noted.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2024, global expenditure on compute and storage infrastructure products for cloud deployments saw a significant rise of 36.9% compared to the previous year. This data was reported by IDC, a renowned market research firm based in Needham, Massachusetts.

news.headline: Data breach at Evolve Bank & Trust exposes customers' SSNs and financial info. Number of affected consumers unknown.
news.summary: In Marlton, New Jersey on June 28, 2024, an undisclosed amount of customers are receiving alerts that hackers have likely accessed their Social Security numbers and other private data from Evolve Bank & Trust. The stolen information was subsequently disclosed on the dark web.

news.headline: HK Monetary Authority: May 2024 sees 1.1% surge in total deposits, notably in HKD & foreign currency.
news.summary: In May 2024, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority revealed a 1.1% surge in overall deposits. This increase was driven by significant growth in both Hong Kong dollar and foreign currency deposits.

news.headline: WISeKey shareholders approve all 2024 AGM agenda items, marking a successful annual meeting.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2% in the last quarter, reaching a total of 8%. This rise has resulted in approximately 1.5 million people being out of work. Additionally, the GDP growth has slowed down to 3% this year, marking a decline from the previous projection of 5%. The government has announced plans to introduce new measures to address this economic downturn and boost employment opportunities.

news.headline: Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP) to release Q2 2024 results on July 25, 2024, at 8:00 am ET on IndependentBank.com.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP), the parent company of Independent Bank, a community bank in Michigan, revealed plans to disclose its second quarter 2024 results on July 25, 2024, around 8:00 am ET. Interested parties can access the publication on IndependentBank.com under the “News” section within the “Investor Relations” portion of the website.

news.headline: Fed's Bowman says congress shows little interest in central bank digital currency.
Data breach at Infosys McCamish Systems exposes 6M Social Security numbers, affecting Oceanview customers.
news.summary: In Marlton, New Jersey, on June 28, 2024, around six million individuals are receiving alerts regarding the exposure of their Social Security numbers and sensitive data due to a security breach at Infosys McCamish Systems, Inc. The legal team at Console & Co. is assisting with this data breach incident.

news.headline: Pelican Landing Assisted Living and Memory Care in Vero Beach, FL, celebrates 7th year as a Great Place to Work®.
news.summary: In a statement released on June 28, 2024, Pelican Landing Assisted Living and Memory Care in Vero Beach, Florida achieved their seventh consecutive year of being recognized as a Great Place to Work® with operational management by Watercrest Senior Living. This certification marks the dedication to providing exceptional work environments for employees. Pelican Landing Assisted Living and Memory Care's ongoing commitment to this standard speaks volumes, highlighting the commendable efforts by the staff and leadership.

news.headline: "Report forecasts CX Transformation market growth till 2025. Industry faces disruption, struggle in budget allocation and goal alignment."
news.summary: A report titled "Growth Opportunities in CX Transformation 2024 to 2025" has been recently included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Customer Experience (CX) industry is facing disruption, with IT decision-makers and customer contact leaders finding it challenging to prioritize and secure budgets while convincing executives to synchronize CX with corporate objectives. In the current uncertain climate, organizations are exhibiting less agility, driven by a fear of failure. Key factors such as trust, ease of use, and reliability are becoming crucial in decision-making processes.

news.headline: S&P 500 up steadily this year, but beneath calm exterior lies significant unrest on Wall Street.
news.summary: The S&P 500 index has experienced significant growth this year, with minimal fluctuations in value. However, beneath the surface, there is substantial instability and upheaval present within the market.

news.headline: South Africa prefabricated construction industry expected to reach ZAR 7.58 billion in 2024, with a growth rate of 6.7%.
news.summary: A report titled "South Africa Prefabricated Construction Industry Business and Investment Opportunities Databook - Q1 2024 Update" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The prefabricated construction sector in South Africa is projected to increase by 6.7%, reaching ZAR 7.58 billion in 2024. The report includes over 100 key performance indicators, market size, and forecasts segmented by end markets, precast products, and precast materials. The long-term growth outlook for the prefabricated construction industry in South Africa remains promising.

news.headline: Bitcoin price remains above $60K despite cooling PCE data, raising support concerns among analysts.
news.summary: Bitcoin's price has shown a lackluster response to recent U.S. macro data, causing worry among analysts regarding the $60,000 support level.

news.headline: Tech companies driving change in AI era - Avant Technologies Inc. leads charge. June 28, 2024: USA News Group report.
news.summary: Avant Technologies Inc. released a commentary through USA News Group in Vancouver, BC on June 28, 2024. The article discusses the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) in the current Transformative AI era. This era is bringing about significant changes with numerous benefits.

news.headline: Orico Tech introduces Orico Data Matrix, 1st hybrid storage for post-production with 3000MB/s speed, RAID Stacking, and Apple integration.
news.summary: Orico Tech, based in SHENZHEN, China, revealed the new Orico Data Matrix (DMM) with innovative features. This includes a hybrid SSD+WD Red™ storage system offering a 3000MB/s editing speed, RAID stacking capabilities, and silent operation. Additionally, the device promises seamless integration with Apple products. This revolutionary product is set to change the game in storage solutions.

news.headline: Chile's recovery boosts copper supply, positive news for the market. #copper #Chile #recovery
Demand for accounting software is increasing as companies seek faster and more efficient processes; ISG reports.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, the demand for accounting software is increasing according to ISG. Companies are facing heightened scrutiny and are seeking improved speed and efficiency. This trend is driven by the need for advanced accounting solutions to meet the evolving challenges of modern business environments. The surge in demand highlights the importance of technology in streamlining financial processes and enhancing accuracy. The emphasis on accounting software is reflected in the growing number of companies adopting these tools to stay competitive and compliant with industry standards.

news.headline: TruBridge ranked top by Black Book 2024 for RCM, Highest in Outsourcing for Hospitals Under 100 Beds and Community Hospitals.
news.summary: TruBridge, Inc., a healthcare solutions company listed on NASDAQ under TBRG, was recently recognized in the 2024 Black Book Research user survey. The survey, which gathered input from 6,771 health system leaders, identified TruBridge as a leading provider in End-to-End Revenue Cycle Management (RCM). Additionally, TruBridge was ranked as the top performer in Outsourcing for Hospitals with under 100 beds and in Community Hospital Inpatient Accounting System. The Black Book Research rankings are notable for their comprehensive nature and aim to highlight top performers in the industry.

news.headline: Freeflow Ventures raises $90M for early stage deep tech investments, total assets under management.
news.summary: Freeflow Ventures, a venture capital firm in Pasadena and Berkeley, California, specializing in science-driven solutions for human and planetary health challenges, recently revealed the successful raising of $50 million in new funds. This includes the $35 million Fund Two and the $15 million Opportunity Fund. With this, their total assets under management have reached $90 million, including the previous $25 million Fund One and $15 million from SPVs. Despite a tough VC market, Freeflow managed to double its fundraising from Fund One to Fund Two.

news.headline: US May capacity utilization rate adjusted to 78.2% (was 78.7%), and May manufacturing output adjusted to +0.6% (was +0.9%)
Poll: Macron's group at 20%, Le Pen at 34%. #elections
INMOTION's Challenger Electric Unicycle wins Red Dot Award in Germany for design excellence.
news.summary: In ESSEN, Germany on June 28, 2024, INMOTION, a leader in personal transportation, proudly shared exciting news about their Challenger Electric Unicycle. The product has achieved great recognition by winning the acclaimed Red Dot Award, along with the prestigious "Best of the Best" title for its revolutionary design. This marks a significant achievement for the company, highlighting their commitment to pushing boundaries in personal mobility.

news.headline: Coohom Cloud showcases new 2D and 3D interior data solutions at CVPR 2024 in Hangzhou, China. #AI #innovation.
news.summary: In Hangzhou, China on June 28, 2024, Coohom Cloud showcased its new developments in 2D and 3D interior dataset products at the CVPR 2024. A prominent player in AI data services, Coohom Cloud shared innovative solutions at the event.

news.headline: Broadway Licensing partners with Terrence McNally Foundation to create new cover designs against anti-LGBTQIA+ laws.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Broadway Licensing Global revealed a new collaboration with the Terrence McNally Foundation to support classic American and British plays and musicals. As a leading global publisher, BLG is known for distributing a wide array of theatrical works. The partnership, introduced during Pride Month, showcases a commitment to diversity and artistic contributions.

news.headline: USRA appoints Dr. Walter S. Kiefer as Director of LPI after a national search. He was the Associate Director.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the Universities Space Research Association (USRA) announced the appointment of Dr. Walter S. Kiefer as the new Director of the Lunar and Planetary Institute (LPI). Dr. Kiefer assumed the position on June 24, 2024, after a thorough national search process. He brings with him experience from his previous role as the Associate Director at LPI. This transition marks a significant development in the organization's leadership, signaling a new chapter under Dr. Kiefer's direction.

news.headline: iFoto introduces AI clothes changer for instant outfit generation based on user description. Revolutionary tech launched on June 28, 2024.
news.summary: Quickly switch outfits with iFoto's AI clothing changing feature. This innovative tool can generate new clothing options based on your description instantly. Recently unveiled by iFoto, a leading provider of image enhancement solutions, this cutting-edge technology is set to revolutionize the way we dress. The launch took place in Hong Kong on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Credit Agricole Sa has cut its liquidity contract resources with Kepler Cheuvreux in a recent move.
BranchOut Food closes $1.4M follow-on public offering.
Trump's debate win boosts S&P 500 as Biden falters; futures rise. Investors favor Trump, uncertain of his policies.
news.summary: The S&P 500 futures saw a slight increase as President Biden faced challenges during the debate. There is a growing preference among investors for former President Trump, although his policies are not guaranteed to have a significant impact. Trump's strong performance in the debate has led to a lift in the S&P 500 index, while discussions about Biden potentially exiting the race are circulating. This news update was originally published by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Protagonist Therapeutics to replace Encore Wire in S&P SmallCap 600, stock surges.
news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics is set to be added to the S&P SmallCap 600 index next Wednesday, taking the spot of Encore Wire, a manufacturer of copper and aluminum wire. This news has caused a surge in Protagonist Therapeutics' stock price, making it an attractive investment option for many. The company's market value is expected to reach [insert value] as a result of this development. This transition marks a significant milestone for Protagonist Therapeutics as it continues to grow and gain recognition in the market.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Apple will lead consumer AI market, citing unique advantages. Apple likely to dominate in AI sector.
news.summary: An analyst's report on Friday predicts that Apple will emerge as a prominent player in the consumer AI sector due to its distinctive strengths. The report underscores Apple's potential to lead the market in this technology segment. The news has generated significant interest among investors and industry followers.

news.headline: Stock Market Today column provides news and analysis on market trends. Key resource for investors.
news.summary: Refer to the Stock Market Today section for updates on market trends and top-performing stocks to consider for buying or monitoring. This column provides insights into stock market news and analysis to help investors stay informed. Stay on top of the latest trends with the Stock Market Today feature from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Top 5 biotech stocks outperform with strong ratings, promising charts, and tech leadership.
news.summary: Today, the leading five biotech stocks share noteworthy similarities, including robust ratings and being labeled as Tech Leaders. These companies exhibit promising trends on their charts, setting them apart from most other stocks in the market.

news.headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit all-time highs, Carnival, Micron, Nike in focus. Stock market standouts: software, small caps, megacaps.
news.summary: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq have achieved new record highs in the stock market. Software, small caps, and megacaps showed notable performance. The recent stock market rally has been strong, with indexes hitting all-time highs. Companies like Carnival, Micron, and Nike were in focus during the week.

news.headline: European regulators rejected PTC Therapeutics' drug for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, leading to a tumble in shares.
news.summary: European regulatory authorities have once again rejected PTC Therapeutics' drug for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, causing a significant drop in PTC's stock value on Friday. This latest setback continues the company's troubled journey with a series of rejections. The rejection led to shares tumbling, reflecting investor concern.

news.headline: Amazon reaches $2 trillion market cap under CEO Andy Jassy, with cost-cutting strategies driving stock to record highs.
news.summary: Following a turbulent three-year period as Amazon's CEO, Andy Jassy's focus on reducing expenses and enhancing services has propelled the company's stock to reach record highs. With Amazon's market value surpassing $2 trillion under Jassy's leadership, investors are now contemplating the company's next steps.

news.headline: ElevenLabs' AI boosts audiobook sales for author Leeanna Morgan by converting novels into audio, increasing revenue.
news.summary: Leeanna Morgan, a bestselling author, utilized ElevenLabs' AI voice technology to transform her novels into audiobooks. This move has led to a notable increase in sales for Morgan.
